title: Placify - Internship Portal
description: Real time internship portal for students and companies using MERN Stack.
knowMore: Placify – Student Internship Portal
Planned and built Placify, a MERN stack internship management platform with role-based authentication using JWT tokens and bcrypt-based password hashing to ensure secure user access.
Executed real-time workflows using Socket.IO, enabling live notifications, application status tracking, candidate shortlisting/rejection, and task assignment.
Integrated and optimized AI-driven features using the Gemini AI API to generate newsletters, course content, and task descriptions, improving automation and platform productivity.
Architected and evaluated scalable RESTful APIs and role-specific dashboards for students and companies, supporting internship postings, profile management, application tracking, and notifications.
Tech Stack: MERN (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js), Socket.IO, RESTful APIs, bcrypt, Git, Postman.

title: SpalshBook - Service Booking App
description: An android application for booking various services with user-friendly interface.
knowMore: Splash Book : A Dual-Side Mobile Application for Service Bookings
Created and built a native Android application using Kotlin and XML to deliver seamless booking services across salons, boutiques, and home-cleaning categories.
Applied role-based dashboards for efficient inventory, staff scheduling, and booking management.
Implemented Firebase Realtime Database to enable live availability tracking and real-time slot booking
Enhanced authentication and data flow using Firebase Auth and Firestore to achieve secure access and low-latency application performance.
Tech Stack: Kotlin, XML, Firebase Authentication, Firestore, Firebase Realtime Database

title: XamXpress - Online Examination System
description: Dual-portal platform for teachers and students.
knowMore: XamXpress : Online Examination Platform
Engineered a role-based dual-portal examination platform enabling secure test creation, scheduling, and controlled distribution to individual students or batches.
Implemented monitoring and validation mechanisms including live webcam and microphone checks to help maintain exam integrity and reduce malpractice risks.
Built automated evaluation workflows to process student responses, generate instant results, and produce detailed performance reports.
Improved system usability and reliability by optimizing question navigation, real-time exam handling, and UI backend integration.
Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, XAMPP

title: Inkwell - Blogging Website
description: A medium-inspired blogging platform built with MERN stack for writing, reading, and community interaction.
knowMore: Inkwell – Blogging Website
Engineered secure user authentication and authorization using JWT tokens and bcrypt hashing, implementing protected routes and role-based access control for authors and admin users.
Crafted a social engagement layer with follower/following system, post likes, nested comment threads, and bookmark functionality, enabling community interaction across the platform.

Delivered a responsive, component-driven frontend with reusable UI components, animated page transitions via Framer Motion, and an author dashboard displaying post-performance metrics including views, likes, and comments.
Tech Stack: MERN Stack, RESTful APIs, bcrypt, Git, Framer Motion, Tailwind
